projects.name: APM Infrastructure Analyst
projects.description: Lead all IT Infrastructure efforts for the integration of the Advanced Patient Monitoring business unit after it's acquisition from Edwards Lifesciences.
projects.extendedDescription: Lead all IT Infrastructure efforts for the integration of the Advanced Patient Monitoring business unit after it's acquisition from Edwards Lifesciences.

projects.name: Penetration Testing Analyst
projects.description: Conducted thorough penetration testing and vulnerability assessments on BD's medical technology products in alignment with industry-recognized methodologies and frameworks including NIST SP 800-115, OWASP ASVS, OSSTMM, MITRE ATT&CK for ICS, and FDA Premarket & Postmarket Cybersecurity Guidance.
projects.extendedDescription: Conducted thorough penetration testing and vulnerability assessments on BD's medical technology products in alignment with industry-recognized methodologies and frameworks including NIST SP 800-115, OWASP ASVS, OSSTMM, MITRE ATT&CK for ICS, and FDA Premarket & Postmarket Cybersecurity Guidance.

projects.name: Privacy Technology Analyst
projects.description: Co-led the development and rollout of a global privacy risk management process for IT associates and conducted 150+ assessments of IT and OT systems for privacy applicability in multiple legal jurisdictions including GDPR, LDGP, and CCPA.
projects.extendedDescription: Co-led the development and rollout of a global privacy risk management process for IT associates and conducted 150+ assessments of IT and OT systems for privacy applicability in multiple legal jurisdictions including GDPR, LDGP, and CCPA.

projects.name: Undergraduate Research Assistant
projects.description: Using the Unity engine and C# programming language to develop a virtual reality setting to explore stereotypes in interracial interactions as part of social psychology research.
projects.extendedDescription: Using the Unity engine and C# programming language to develop a virtual reality setting to explore stereotypes in interracial interactions as part of social psychology research.
